title: Safety & Security Officer
description:
Main Duties & Responsibilities:

  • Responsible for securing all hotel properties, staff and guests in accordance with the procedures laid down in the security manual.
  • Observes guest and others, patrol lobbies, corridors, back of the house areas, public room and surroundings to detect infringement or suspicious person courteously.
  • Keep a watchful eye on the Luggage and other belongings left unattended.
  • Conduct investigations and keep superiors informed on accidents involving disturbance, accident, losses, thefts, etc. occurring in the hotel during their tour of duty.
  • Accompanies Duty Manager in investigating irregularities in guest rooms and public area when requested.
  • Records details of significant incident and activities in the logbook during his shifts.
  • May be assigned to coordinate with local authorities in investigating and handling crimes, accidents, etc. involving the hotel, its staff or guest.
  • Ensure that the Security Check-Point is manned.
  • Check all the books, files, Security passes, Singapore Identity cards, Work Permits, all the keys in the Key Press, all the Equipment in the Security Office, etc.
  • atrol the guest floors and ensure all guest rooms are looked.
  • Advise all guests with door-ajar and report.
  • Ensure all the offices are locked after office hours.
  • Ensure all Lost and Found properties are recorded in the Occurrence Log in the system, hand them over to the Housekeeping Department as soon as possible and keep the Duty Manager informed. All valuable items must be handed over to Safety & Security Manager for safekeeping until a claim is made.
  • Performs Bank Escort with Finance Cashier.
  • Be familiar with the Fire Emergency Plan and a member of the Fire Fighting Team (FFT).
  • Render first aid to the sick and the injured person


Job Requirements

  • Compressed work week with 4 working day from 12 hours per day
  • Security Licence is required
  • Able to work on weekends and Public Holidays

postedCompany.description:
Located in the heart of Bugis’ shopping, arts and cultural districts, Mercure Singapore Bugis is an international branded hotel situated next to the Bugis+ shopping centre and within a 5-minute walk to Bugis MRT station.


The hotel features 395 funky heritage inspired rooms, as well as two restaurants including a Western and a Chinese restaurant, 6 meeting rooms, a lobby bar, a swimming pool, fitness lounge, jacuzzi and many outdoor spaces for events including a Skydeck on the top floor of the hotel.


The hotel’s proximity to the city’s main landmark attractions, and accessibility via public transportation ensure this is a high profile hotel in the middle of Singapore.
postedCompany.name: MERCURE SINGAPORE BUGIS
